The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and expectorant properties. The bioactive constituents of Aulosepalum include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
